value.found_quote: Enable computer use in the Claude Code CLI so Claude can open apps, click, type, and see your screen on macOS. Test native apps, debug visual issues, and automate GUI-only tools without leaving your terminal.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes Anthropic's Computer Use offering, which allows Claude to open apps, control the screen, click, type, and see the screen on macOS to complete GUI-based tasks. The claim matches the page content closely. The page also notes it is a "research preview," placing its lifecycle status as preview/beta rather than generally available.
